title: SubmitPreflightReport
description:
Output ``data`` block for ``submit-preflight`` (WS5 #1).

Wraps inside the standard SuccessEnvelope's ``data`` field (see
envelope.json). Carries one ``SubResult`` per fanned-out sub-call plus
the overall verdict derived from them. Skipped sub-calls (per
``input.skip``) appear as ``null`` so consumers can still introspect
shape uniformly.

On a sub-call failure (a sub-envelope with ``ok: false``):

* ``overall`` becomes ``"fail"``.
* The composite still emits ``ok: true`` at the OUTER envelope — the
  rationale is that the *composite ran successfully*; the failure is in
  the sub-call's data, surfaced via ``overall`` + the SubResult's
  ``envelope`` payload. This preserves work done by the parallel
  siblings that succeeded (no partial-results loss). The CLI verb may
  choose to translate ``overall: "fail"`` to a non-zero exit code for
  shell-style callers; the envelope shape stays uniform either way.

overall.title: Overall
overall.description: Derived: ``fail`` if any non-skipped sub-call returned ``ok: false``; else ``warn`` if validate-campaign returned ``overall: warn``; else ``pass``.

elapsed_total_sec.title: Elapsed Total Sec
elapsed_total_sec.description: Wall-clock seconds for the entire fan-out — with the ``asyncio`` strategy this is approximately the slowest single sub-call's elapsed_sec, not the sum.

fanout_strategy.title: Fanout Strategy
fanout_strategy.description: Echoed from input; confirms which mode actually ran.

SubResult.description:
One sub-call's outcome inside the composite.

* ``envelope`` — the verbatim envelope the sub-call emitted (matches
  envelope.json's oneOf shape; not re-validated here so a sub-call's
  data block can use any open shape).
* ``elapsed_sec`` — wall-clock seconds for *this* sub-call only.
* ``ok`` — mirror of ``envelope.ok`` so consumers can branch without
  needing to dive into the envelope.

Skipped sub-calls appear at the parent level as ``null``, not as a
SubResult with ``ok: false`` — the distinction matters for
callers that re-run only the failed pieces.

envelope.title: Envelope
envelope.description: Verbatim envelope from the sub-call (see envelope.json).

ok.title: Ok
ok.description: Mirror of ``envelope.ok`` for fast branching without diving in.

SubResult.title: SubResult
